faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1Title: Can I upgrade my plan later?
faq.q1Answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.
faq.q2Title: Do I need technical skills to get started?
faq.q2Answer: Not at all. Our platform is designed to be simple and intuitive, and our team is here to help you launch your website with just a few clicks.
faq.q3Title: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.q3Answer: We accept all major credit cards, bank transfers, and mobile payment options.
faq.q4Answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time with no hidden fees or penalties.

subscription.heading: Select Your Subscription Plan
subscription.subheading: Choose the package that best fits your business needs to continue setup.
